title: Fix signed enum false wrap-around error when crossing zero

features.name: signed enum with negative base value crossing zero
features.description: Code should include a signed enum typedef with int base type where the first explicitly assigned value is negative and auto-incremented successors cross zero
features.snippet: typedef enum int { A = -2, B, C, D } signed_e;

features.name: signed enum auto-increment through zero
features.description: Code should include enum items that auto-increment from a negative value through zero to positive, triggering the false wrap-around detection
features.snippet: typedef enum int { A = -2, B, C, D } signed_e;
